channel.title: Frontion - Geopolitical News Headlines
channel.description: Tier 1 geopolitical news headlines curated from world-class sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇱 US, Iran, Hezbollah spar over ceasefire terms as deal signing set for Friday in Switzerland
item.description: Source: DW | 🇺🇸🇮🇱 Iran insists Israel withdraw from southern Lebanon as part of the ceasefire deal, while the US Senate narrowly blocked a war powers resolution to end the Iran war. The official signing ceremony for the US-Iran deal is scheduled for Friday in Switzerland.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷💰 Trump denies US will invest money in Iran, says $300B fund report is "ridiculous"
item.description: Source: CNBC | 🇺🇸🇮🇷💰 At the G7 summit, President Trump told reporters the US is "not investing any money in Iran" and dismissed reports of a $300 billion investment fund. VP Vance said any fund would come from the Gulf Coalition, not US taxpayers.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ Trump says he will send Iran deal to Congress for approval
item.description: Source: UPI | 🇺🇸🏛️ President Trump told reporters at the G7 summit he would send the Iran peace agreement to Congress for approval, saying "I like the idea." Sen. Lindsey Graham expressed concern that Iran's view of the deal seems different from what the US negotiating team claims.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇬🇧🇫🇷 G7 allies push Ukraine back onto agenda as Zelenskyy joins leaders for talks
item.description: Source: NPR | 🇺🇦🇬🇧🇫🇷 Ukraine's allies at the G7 summit scrambled to refocus attention on the war with Russia, which had been overshadowed by the Iran conflict. Zelenskyy joined leaders for a 75-minute working session. The UK announced new sanctions on Russia's shadow fleet and seized a Russian vessel in the English Channel.

item.title: 🇬🇧🇷🇺⚔️ UK announces new sanctions on Russian shadow fleet, seizes vessel in English Channel
item.description: Source: The Guardian | 🇬🇧🇷🇺⚔️ The UK unveiled a new package of sanctions targeting Russia's shadow oil fleet and finance networks. British troops seized a Russian shadow fleet vessel in the English Channel for the first time. The move comes as G7 leaders push to squeeze Russian oil revenues.

item.title: ⚔️ US diplomats face fallout over Islamic State prisoner transfers from Syria
item.description: Source: Politico | ⚔️ American diplomats are aware of fresh allegations regarding Islamic State terrorism detainees transferred from Syria, raising concerns about security and accountability as the US reshapes its Middle East posture.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China cruising to become world top tourism market with visa waivers and high-speed rail
item.description: Source: SCMP | 🇨🇳 Visa waivers for over 70 countries and surging domestic travel are pushing China toward overtaking the US as the worlds largest tourism market, reshaping global tourism patterns.

item.title: 🛢️ Major banks slash 2027 oil price forecasts as Hormuz reopening deflates war premium
item.description: Source: The Bull | 🛢️ Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are leading a wave of oil forecast downgrades after the US-Iran deal signalled the Strait of Hormuz will reopen, rapidly unwinding the crisis-era war premium on crude prices.

item.title: 🇭🇰 Hong Kong Science Park partners with SenseTime to build home-grown AI data center
item.description: Source: SCMP | 🇭🇰 Hong Kong Science Park and SenseTime are partnering to build a domestic AI data center targeting 40,000 petaflops by 2030, amid growing competition in the regional AI infrastructure race.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump says Iran deal to be public soon, will rule out nuclear weapon for Tehran
item.description: Source: Reuters | 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Details of the US-Iran interim deal emerged at the G7 summit, with Trump saying the accord will be made public soon and will prohibit Iran from developing a nuclear weapon. How the deal will work in practice remains unclear.

item.title: 🇨🇦🇷🇺 Canada imposes sanctions on Russias shadow fleet and energy revenues at G7
item.description: Source: Reuters | 🇨🇦🇷🇺 PM Carney announced new sanctions targeting Russias shadow fleet, energy revenues, defense-industrial sector, and disinformation entities at the G7 summit, as allies push to refocus pressure on Moscow over Ukraine.

item.title: 🏛️ White House Iran deal talking points often dont meet reality, AP finds
item.description: Source: AP News | 🏛️ An AP analysis finds that the White Houses claims of accomplishments in the Iran war deal frequently diverge from the actual terms and realities of the agreement.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo praises US-Iran interim peace deal, says thanks be to God
item.description: Source: MSN | ⛪ Pope Leo XIV welcomed the interim US-Iran deal to end the Middle East war, expressing hope it will provide a definite end to the conflict. He said the formalization expected Friday gives reason for gratitude.

item.title: 🛢️ Deal or no deal, oil prices will stay high for months
item.description: Source: The Economist | 🛢️ Even with the US-Iran peace accord, The Economist reports that global oil prices are likely to remain elevated for months as physical supply chains and shipping routes take time to normalize.

item.title: 🇯🇵💰 Bank of Japan raises rates to 31-year high, signals further hikes ahead
item.description: Source: Reuters | 🇯🇵💰 The Bank of Japan raised interest rates to their highest level in 31 years in a landmark policy normalization step, signaling readiness to tighten further as it focuses on taming price pressures from the Iran-war-induced energy shock.

item.title: 🇫🇷🏛️ Trump meets world leaders at G7 as Iran deal takes center stage
item.description: Source: CNN | 🇫🇷🏛️ World leaders sought clarity on the Iran deal framework at the G7 summit, with Iran demanding Israel withdraw from Lebanon as part of the agreement, while Trump said Netanyahu needs to be "more responsible."

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israel Refuses Lebanon Withdrawal Despite Iran Deal Pressure
item.description: Source: Jerusalem Post | 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israel says it will not withdraw forces from Lebanon even as Iran insists the US-Iran peace deal requires Israeli troops to leave. Hezbollah claims Iran has pledged to pursue Israeli withdrawal as a condition for any final nuclear agreement.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇦🇺⚔️ US Military Plans Permanent Weapons Stockpile in Australia
item.description: Source: SCMP | 🇺🇸🇦🇺⚔️ US Navy documents reveal advanced planning for a large war-ready weapons stockpile in Australia, with $30 million allocated to build warehouses and offices. The move signals deeper US military posture in the Indo-Pacific.

item.title: 🇺🇦✈️ Ukrainian Su-24 Bomber Crashes, Both Pilots Killed
item.description: Source: Kyiv Independent | 🇺🇦✈️ A Ukrainian Su-24 bomber crashed in Khmelnytskyi Oblast on the evening of June 16, killing both the pilot and navigator. The Air Force confirmed the incident, with the cause under investigation.

item.title: 🇷🇺🛢️ Trump signals swift return of sanctions on Russian oil as G7 refocuses on Ukraine
item.description: Source: AP News | 🇷🇺🛢️ At the G7 summit in France, Trump indicated he may reimpose sanctions on Russian oil soon, as world leaders pushed Ukraine back to the top of the agenda alongside the Iran deal.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukrainian drone strike halts operations at Moscow oil refinery
item.description: Source: Reuters | 🇺🇦⚔️ A Ukrainian drone attack sparked a fire at Moscows largest fuel-supplying refinery, halting operations. Zelenskiy described the strike as coercion to push Russia toward peace talks.

item.title: 🇮🇷🛢️ Trump insists Strait of Hormuz will open toll-free under Iran deal
item.description: Source: BBC | 🇮🇷🛢️ Speaking at the G7 summit, Trump declared the Strait of Hormuz would reopen toll-free under the US-Iran deal, as oil prices fell 5% to a three-month low on hopes of restored shipping.

item.title: 🌍💰 The Iran war permanently altered the global economy
item.description: Source: New York Times | 🌍💰 The New York Times analyzes how the US-Iran conflict has fundamentally reshaped global trade, energy markets, and economic alliances in ways unlikely to revert even with a peace deal.

item.title: 🇪🇺🏦 ECB will stay proactive on inflation even after Iran deal, Lane says
item.description: Source: Reuters | 🇪🇺🏦 ECB chief economist Philip Lane said the central bank will remain proactive in fighting high inflation despite falling energy prices following the US-Iran deal, signaling rates may stay elevated.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚽ Iran soccer team forced to train in Tijuana after being blocked from U.S. entry
item.description: Source: NPR | 🇮🇷⚽ Iran World Cup squad was denied entry to train in the United States amid wartime tensions, finding an unlikely welcome in the Mexican border city of Tijuana — a story where sport and geopolitics collide.
